title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the AI model from the surrounding infrastructure (rules, skills, hooks, subagents) which comprises roughly 98% of effective agentic systems. It operates at two levels: the AI layer around a single session and orchestrating multiple focused agent sessions into reliable workflows for larger tasks.
